basic_details.job_title: NEHU Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: North-Eastern Hill University (NEHU) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 1 Research Assistant Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can download the application form from the official website and submit it offline.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Sc in Life Sciences with experience of working in Microbiology Laboratory and Microbial Culture Handling.
qualification.details: B.Sc in Life Sciences with experience of working in Microbiology Laboratory and Microbial Culture Handling.

salary_details.pay_scale: As per project norms of the funding agency
salary_details.details: As per project norms of the funding agency

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NEHU Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 03-08-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NEHU Research Assistant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the NEHU Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for NEHU Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 03-08-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NEHU Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NEHU Research Assistant position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your offline application for the Research Assistant position at North-Eastern Hill University is August 3, 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the required qualification for the Research Assistant role?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Research Assistant position, candidates must possess a B.Sc degree in Life Sciences and have prior experience working in a Microbiology Laboratory, including handling microbial cultures.

faq.question: Q3. Is there an application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category of candidates (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the Research Assistant recruitment at NEHU.

faq.question: Q4. What is the mode of application for the NEHU Research Assistant posts?
faq.answer: The application process for the Research Assistant position at North-Eastern Hill University is strictly offline. Candidates need to download the form and submit it via post.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Research Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Research Assistant position in the North-Eastern Hill University (NEHU) recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Research Assistant position?
faq.answer: The salary for the Research Assistant position will be determined as per the project norms of the funding agency. Specific details will be available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this Research Assistant role?
faq.answer: The Research Assistant position at NEHU is a contract-based job. This means the employment will be for a fixed tenure as per the project requirements.

faq.question: Q8. Where is NEHU located?
faq.answer: North-Eastern Hill University (NEHU) is located in Shillong, Meghalaya, with the pincode 793022.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates apply through online mode?
faq.answer: No, the application mode for this recruitment is offline only. Candidates are required to download the application form and submit it through post.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are generally required for offline applications?
faq.answer: Typically, for offline applications, you will need to attach self-attested copies of your photograph, signature, ID proof, and relevant educational and experience certificates as mentioned in the notification.
